title: Session Messaging & Subtask Delegation
method_signatures: delegateSubtask({ sessionId, toNodeId, title, description, role })

sendMessage: [sessionId missing?] → throw Error('sessionId is required') → END (error)
Sanitize payload: if not object → use {}
Build envelope: { type:'session_message', payload:{ session_id, to_node_id (null=broadcast), msg_type (default:'context_update'), payload, sent_at:ISO }, priority:'normal' }
delegateSubtask: Receive: sessionId, toNodeId (optional), title, description (optional), role (optional)
[sessionId missing?] → throw Error('sessionId is required') → END (error)
[title missing?] → throw Error('title is required') → END (error)
[role valid?] → use provided role | [role invalid/missing] → use default 'builder'
Build envelope: { type:'session_delegate', payload:{ session_id, to_node_id (null=broadcast), title, description, role, delegated_at:ISO }, priority:'high' }
submitResult: [sessionId missing?] → throw Error('sessionId is required') → END (error)
[taskId missing?] → throw Error('taskId is required') → END (error)
Sanitize summary: if string → slice to 200 chars; else use ''
Build envelope: { type:'session_submit', payload:{ session_id, task_id, result_asset_id (null if absent), summary, submitted_at:ISO }, priority:'high' }
createSession: [title missing?] → throw Error('title is required') → END (error)
Clamp inviteNodeIds: Array.isArray → slice to max 10; else []
Build envelope: { type:'session_create', payload:{ title, description, invite_node_ids, max_participants, created_at:ISO }, priority:'high' }
joinSession: Build envelope: { type:'session_join', payload:{ session_id, joined_at:ISO }, priority:'normal' }
leaveSession: Build envelope: { type:'session_leave', payload:{ session_id, left_at:ISO }, priority:'normal' }

validation_rules: createSession: title required; inviteNodeIds capped at 10; maxParticipants clamped 2–20 (default 5)
sendMessage: sessionId required; payload must be object (else {}); serialized size ≤ 16000 bytes; msgType defaults to 'context_update'; toNodeId null = broadcast
delegateSubtask: sessionId + title required; role must be one of ['builder','planner','reviewer'], defaults to 'builder'
submitResult: sessionId + taskId required; summary truncated to 200 chars; resultAssetId optional (null if absent)
key_relationships: SessionHandler operates as proxy extension — wraps Hub mailbox transport for session protocol
important_notes: All methods are synchronous wrappers around store.send/poll/list. Errors are thrown eagerly (no try/catch — caller is responsible). toNodeId null signals a session-wide broadcast. Priority 'high' for create/delegate/submit; 'normal' for join/leave/message. The file path in the suggested scope (proxy/extensions/sessionHandler.js) maps to src/proxy/extensions/sessionHandler.js in the project.
